justification: All pass criteria met: PM/Legal contradiction explicitly identified and escalated (escalation #1 with detailed options); clock-start ambiguity identified and escalated (escalation #3); wrong-address exception from Finance noted (BR-6, ubiquitous language, edge cases); auto-refund vs 3-day processing conflict noted (BR-7 vs BR-9, edge case on double-refund risk); 10 rules extracted with correct invariant classifications; 5 formal escalations (exceeds minimum of 2); confidence.level = 38 (well under 50 threshold).

observations.text: PM/Legal guarantee-vs-best-effort contradiction is the centerpiece of the analysis, identified as highest risk, with a pragmatic Option C recommendation — exactly what Bird should do.
Clock-start ambiguity gets its own dedicated escalation with three concrete options and a clear recommendation grounded in customer perception.
Wrong-address exclusion surfaced as BR-6, in ubiquitous language as 'Wrong Address Exclusion', and in edge cases (unreachable customer scenario extending the exclusion question).
Auto-refund vs 3-business-day processing tension captured across BR-7, BR-9, and the double-refund edge case — shows Bird connected dots across stakeholders.
10 business rules extracted — well above the 5 minimum — with thoughtful invariant classifications. BR-4 (driver rating) correctly marked as non-invariant since the threshold is policy-adjustable.
5 formal escalations covering contradiction, operational gaps, clock-start, distance calculation, and missing product scope — comprehensive and well-structured with options and recommendations.
Confidence at 38 with detailed reasoning explaining why it's low, plus well-separated high/low confidence areas — demonstrates epistemic honesty.
Edge cases are excellent — midnight crossing, rating drop mid-delivery, double-refund stacking, address change, multi-warehouse selection. These show deep domain reasoning.
Ubiquitous language includes 'Goodwill Refund' — correctly reframing the refund as non-contractual, which aligns with Legal's position while the contradiction remains unresolved.
BR-10 (real-time tracking) marked as invariant is debatable — tracking is a feature requirement, not a domain invariant. A minor classification quibble.
Acceptance criteria array is empty — while justified given unresolved contradictions, Bird could have provided conditional acceptance criteria for the areas with high confidence.

grader_results.detail: field escalations[*].type equals check failed: expected 'contradiction', got values: 'ambiguity', 'ambiguity', 'ambiguity', 'missing_context'
